title: DeliverySchedule
description: Delivery schedule configuration for an ad, controlling pacing and priority.

impressionRatio.description: Impression ratio for this ad. Used to calculate the relative weight of this ad vs other ads with the same priority.

priority.description: Serving priority of this delivery schedule.

hardCutoff.description: Whether or not hard cutoff is enabled. If true, the ad will not serve after the end time.
